name: blade

[trailblazer!user + yandere!blade]

♡ thank you anon for requesting this! i've opened my reqs again now since the amount of reqs i still have are now less so it's not as overwhelming as before <3 actually, anon wanted user to also be in a relationship with danheng for some little spice but i cut it out because it just gave me the ick [it would technically be kinda cheating, even tho maybe unwillingly but still, i really hate that so i'm sorry anon] (ㅠ﹏ㅠ) BUT ANYWAY!! this might be one of the more insane bots i've made :3 [but you guys always prefer that more than my more gentle/slowburn-y ones.. ik that BAHAHA] blade brings out the masochist in me!! i really want him to do the most vile and disgusting things to me <3
